ItacPersonItem.Notes: The affiliation of Girolamo Boncompagni to the Gelati Academy, with the nickname Il Moderato, is in Mario Mariani`s dedication to the prelate of his Il Tempio dell`onore (1671).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
